rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOHN THOMAS HIGGINS REED
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. (1) Notice of Directions for Remote appearance and Access must be given to the decedent's father/heir. LR 14.1.C. (2) Clarification is needed on whether the niece's name is Donna Blaker or Donna Baker. There is a discrepancy between petition #8 and the notice sent. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ESTHER J. PAVLOFF
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 3/18/2026 pending several documents for e-filing, which have not been reviewed yet. Meanwhile, the following issues must be cleared two weeks before the next hearing: (1) A copy of the lost will being offered to probate must be submitted separately. Please see Local Rule 14.20. (2) Also, the proposed order must include a copy of the lost will being offered to be admitted. Prob. Code sec. 8223. (3) Petition #8 states that all trust beneficiaries are listed; however, it is not clear that everyone whose name is listed is a trust beneficiary: Doris, Douglas, William, Carol, David, Ronald, Paula, Daniel, and Christina. Or only a few of them are the trust beneficiaries. Need clarification. (4) The petition said Ronald's location was unknown, but notice was sent to him at a certain address. If the petitioners found Ronald, the petition needs to be updated. A verified supplement should be filed. (5) If David Demers's issues cannot be found, the Court will likely need a declaration of due diligent search stating what was done to locate them. (6) Need to identify which of Daniel's parents is related to the decedent. Paula Kovacs is listed as a niece by marriage, but the petition does not clearly explain how she is related, either. Also need to confirm if Christina is Daniel's child.
